summary: Completed frontend testing of multi-theme architecture feature. All 11 test scenarios PASSED. Theme toggle between Original (dark glassmorphism) and Minimalist (light neumorphic) works correctly. Theme persists after logout/login. Color pickers appear when Minimalist is selected, Glass presets appear when Original is selected.
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext.js: Clean multi-theme architecture with activeThemeMode, neoColors, and saveAllThemeSettings
ThemeTab.js: Conditional rendering for Original (glass presets) vs Minimalist (color pickers) works correctly
Login.js: Has two render paths - one for isMinimalist (neumorphic) and one for original (glass)
Layout.js: useGlassStyle variable correctly differentiates styling between themes
Settings tab correctly renamed from 'Paleta' to 'Apariencia'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme is currently set to 'original' (dark glassmorphism). Both themes fully tested and working. Theme persistence to MongoDB verified via save/logout/login cycle.

theme_toggle_minimalist.description: Click 'Minimalista' button switches to light neumorphic theme globally

theme_toggle_original.description: Click 'Tema Original' button switches back to dark glassmorphism theme globally

login_page_original_theme.description: Login renders correctly with dark glass design, neon effects, colored PIN dots

login_page_minimalist_theme.description: Login renders correctly with light neumorphic design, 3D buttons, soft shadows

settings_apariencia_tab.description: Tab renamed to 'Apariencia', shows Modo de Tema toggle

color_pickers_minimalist.description: Color de Fondo, Color de Brillo (Glow), Color de Acento pickers visible when Minimalist selected

glass_presets_original.description: Temas Predefinidos (Clasico Naranja, Azul Profesional, etc.) shown when Original selected

guardar_tema_button.description: GUARDAR TEMA persists theme selection, shows success toast

theme_persistence_logout_login.description: Saved theme persists and loads correctly after logout/login

dashboard_text_readability_minimalist.description: Dashboard uses dark text on light background in minimalist mode

tables_page_minimalist.description: Mesas page displays correctly in minimalist mode with readable text

cash_register_minimalist.description: Caja page displays correctly in minimalist mode with readable text

sidebar_styling_both_themes.description: Sidebar properly styled in both themes
